title: Glazed Indulgent Irish Salmon Casserole
description: A briny, flaky, and indulgent Irish dish featuring pineapple chunks, made with sous-vide salmon and keto-friendly ingredients. This casserole is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy dinner.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt, black pepper, and dried dill weed.
Place the salmon fillets in a sous-vide machine and cook at 120F for 30 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together the sour cream, irish cheddar cheese, and lemon juice.
Add the pineapple chunks to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Remove the salmon fillets from the sous-vide machine and place them in a baking dish.
Pour the pineapple and cheese mixture over the salmon fillets.
Dot the top of the casserole with butter.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
